# garnishedwages.org

> How bankruptcy stops wage garnishment through the automatic stay.

garnishedwages.org is a free, open-source educational resource. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://garnishedwages.org/ -- How bankruptcy stops wage garnishment
- https://garnishedwages.org/emergency-filing.html -- Emergency bare-bones filing to stop garnishment
- https://garnishedwages.org/getting-money-back.html -- Recovering garnished wages as preferential transfers

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
